title: AI skills for the UK workforce - GOV.UK
text:
Research and analysis
AI skills for the UK workforce
This report analyses AI upskilling needs, barriers and opportunities across 10 growth sectors, and introduces tools to support employers and training providers.

Details
This report has been co-developed by Skills England, however, the opinions expressed in this report are those of the author and do not necessarily reflect the views of Skills England.
The aims of this report are to:
analyse artificial intelligence (
AI
) upskilling needs, barriers and opportunities in 10 key growth sectors
identify common barriers to
AI
skills development that impact organisations of all sizes
introduce a set of
AI
skills tools to help employers and training providers
